item.title: Rejected Cartoons
item.description:
Welcome to another round of cartoons we submitted to the New Yorker but were rejected.
Ok, we didn't even submitted the last three ones because we were too tired to wait for their answer. But still – the New Yorker is the toughest door in the life of a cartoonist and we won't rest until we get in! xx Elizabeth and Jonathan
item.dc:creator: Warandpeasofficial

item.title: Just following orders… through centuries of cruelty.
item.dc:creator: ComicFeels

item.title: Africa Global News has reported that the new Namibian president, Dr. Netumbo Nandi-Ndaithwah, has announced that American citizens entering Namibia will now need to get a visa.Any US citizen caught without a fully approved visa will be deported
item.description: Africa Global News has reported that the new Namibian president, Dr. Netumbo Nandi-Ndaithwah, has announced that American citizens entering Namibia will now need to get a visa. Any US citizen caught without a fully approved visa will be declared an "illegal alien" and treated the same way that President Trump treats African immigrants in the US. There are over 500 US citizens mining diamonds, gold, uranium, copper and other minerals in Namibia without visas. They have been ordered to leave ASAP or be forcibly removed. Namibia, one of the world's top diamond producers, is now taking full control of its diamond mines. Source: Africa Global News
item.dc:creator: Joyika

item.title: I saw this some time ago, and couldn't forget about it since...
item.dc:creator: nvrmndrnbw

item.title: One of the most meaningful court decisions you never heard of
item.description: If you ever wonder why companies get worse over time, you know the “shitification” of our economy. Well, this ruling is a major contributor. While not legally binding (everywhere) this ruling became the overall legal consensus on ShareHolder rights. A company MUST operate in the interest of maximizing revenue and profit even at the cost of society, workers, the planet. Shareholders have become the single most important thing in our economy. The fact is, Shareholders do represent a stakeholder in those businesses and their interests should be heard but workers are stakeholders, customers, neighbours and with multi nationals you can count the whole population as a stakeholder. All stakeholders should be considered, and long term sustainability should be prioritized over short term stock growth.
item.dc:creator: McKittyNuts

Silly friends
Fam group

item.dc:creator: fortytwoembers

item.title: This man is being illegally detained by the Illegitimate, Fascist Trump administration. Details in the post.
item.description: His name is Kilmar Abrego Garcia. He was illegally detained and shipped to El Salvador in just three days. No due process. no oversight. He was literally disappeared. ICE officers performed this illegal detainment with Garcia's autistic and legally disabled son in the truck. (If anyone has footage of this, I'd like to continue using it to influence public opinion) Two judges have *ordered* the Trump administration to bring him back to the United states because his arrest was unwarranted and illegal. The judges who ruled in his favor ordered that he be released/returned by Monday. the lawyers representing the Trump Administration filed for an extension on that order, claiming they needed more time to read the order. Here's the Important part- The Trump Administration deported him in three days. He was not charged with any crime, nor was he guilty of a conviction before he came to the United States. Despite that, he remains held in illegal captivity on the orders of an illegitimate government. And now the Trump administration is saying this: https://www.yahoo.com/news/trump-lawyers-defy-court-over-180403164.html That's a Trump Spokesperson, ya'll. Listen to all those "ummmms" and look at how often she blinks, look at how often she leans away from the mic for a second and then leans forward to speak again. She's lying y'all, and she knows it. This man was illegally detained in a matter of hours and now the administration that did it is asking for an "extension" to try and justify their actions. BECAUSE THEY FUCKING CAN'T Hey @LookingForDwightSchrute I didn't tag this one politics either- because it's not. Please come tell me I'm wrong.
item.dc:creator: Akistos

item.title: Please hold while I fetch my walker.
item.dc:creator: glorytoyouandyourpost

item.title: I've been wearing anti Trump shirts to the VA for all my appointments lately
item.description: And it has actually given me more faith for the future! I had appointments every day this week because my body is a wreck after the Navy. Every single time I go, I've been wearing various political shirts. Examples: "Veterans against Trump" "All gave some, some gave all. One had bone spurs. Veterans against Trump" "I'm a veteran, not a sucker or loser, I swore to defend the constitution" "TRUMP IS A TRAITOR" Yes, I know it's kinda cringe and boot. But I've been wearing them for a reason. I live in Texas and I'm tired of people thinking that all vets are Trumpers. I don't care if I'm cringe or boot, I wear these so other people can see that some of us will speak against this shit. Every single day, at least 2 veterans have told me that they agree, given me high fives, told me they loved my shirt, etc. Multiple staff members have as well! My prosthetisist and my psychiatrist have both said that they wish they could wear things like that or express their opinions that openly. I've had nurses, doctors, and admin all tell me that they love it. I've watched them read my shirts and smile, and treat me me much more warmly. My psych told me that she loves seeing how I'm so willing to stand up for what I believe- and it's just a shirt! But it's a shirt in a veteran hospital, in a red state, and I'm a transgender gay man so I have more of a target on me. And NO ONE HAS SAID SHIT! Sure, I've seen plenty of people read my shirt, purse their lips, glare at me. None of them have said a damn word. Literally nothing verbally negative. Not a single staff member has done any of that btw, only vets and civilians when I go to Walmart or whatever after the VA. Zero negative reactions from VA staff - obviously if they disagree they can't say anything, but I'm talking about not even any negative body language, and I've been watching for it whenever people read the shirts. Today I'm wearing a bright red shirt, with all white caps lettering saying TRUMP IS A TRAITOR. I've been at the VA for 4 hours so far and I've gotten 2 high fives, 4 knuckle bumps, and a fucking hug, which I absolutely loved seeing that level of agreement! I know it's just a shirt. But it's something. And the veterans who's faces light up when they see the shirts, who go "I'm not alone! Other vets hate this too!" I'm gonna keep doing this and wearing these shirts. My sign at the protest last Saturday is the last pic
item.dc:creator: diegosgotpack127001

item.title: The fuck outta here with that shit
item.dc:creator: AgentDoggit83

item.title: The Dark Times
item.description: We well respected professor of both history and political science, someone I admire and respect greately, has been outspoken on the things being done by the Republicans, the Trump administration, and SCOTUS that are not only violations of the Constitution but also correlate to behaviors of fascist states, discovered that they are on a Department of Homeland Security Professor watchlist. Yes, DHS has created a watch list of professors and intellectuals that oppose the current views of the administration. Every student of history has seen this before. We all know what happens next. We are watching it in real time. If you ever wondered what you'd do if you lived during the rise of Nazi-ism in Germany what you're doing now is it. This is that moment. Your actions and words matter.
item.dc:creator: dogboybastard

item.title: When you remember something embarrassing from 3,000 years ago.
item.description: Printed in resin, painted with love (and maybe a little existential dread). The wings were the real challenge — turns out even tiny demons are picky about their angles. 100% 3D printed, 0% remorse.

item.title: Bottom shelf memes
item.description:
@HileyNoteson Yoooooooooooooooooooooo
This is going to be the one that gets me banned from Imgur today.
@RevengeIsIceCream
Here are the two best nature pictures I have ever taken in my life.
Do you hate ads but love memes? Check out discord.gg/bottomshelfvodka
Join for the games. Shit, man. We play everything...if there's a specific game you like, I guarantee you'll find a shitposting meme loving degen there to play it with you. Join for the memes. We share memes in the meme dumpster 24/7 Join for the NSFW memes. Join to ping @humlyhums Join to meet @crimebrulee the biggest problem in the server. Join to leave! Joined to get banned! discord.gg/bottomshelfvodka
Deaf Cat Magoo (short for Oogala Magoogala) has taken a liking to the Roomba recently.
I got raided by someone in the "Pools, Hot Tubs, and Beaches" streaming category on Twitch. I didn't even know that category was an option...good thing I always keep my snorkeling gear on hand.
We play a ton of variety games. We're currently into R.E.P.O., Lethal Company, and Schedule 1, and we're finally going to begin dabbling in D&D. If you ever get bored, come hang out on the discord server or on twitch.tv/bottomshelfvodka
Deaf cat Magoo (short for Oogala Magoogala)
item.dc:creator: BottomShelfVodka
